home.heroTitle: Scan Chrome Extensions for Security Risks
home.heroSubtitle: Analyze permissions, detect secrets, check CASA compliance — all running 100% in your browser. No data leaves your device.

featurePermissions.title: Permission Analysis
featurePermissions.desc: Detect overly broad permissions, dangerous combinations, and host pattern abuse.

featureCasa.title: CASA Pre-Scan
featureCasa.desc: Check your extension against the Cloud Application Security Assessment framework before submission.

featureSecrets.title: Secrets Detection
featureSecrets.desc: Find leaked API keys, tokens, and credentials hidden in extension source files.

featureRemoteCode.title: Remote Code Detection
featureRemoteCode.desc: Flag eval(), dynamic imports, and remote script loading that violate Chrome Web Store policy.

featureCsp.title: CSP Audit
featureCsp.desc: Analyze Content Security Policy headers for unsafe-eval, unsafe-inline, and data: URI usage.

featureObfuscation.title: Obfuscation Detection
featureObfuscation.desc: Identify minified, encoded, or obfuscated code that may hide malicious behavior.

upload.title: Upload Extension
upload.subtitle: Drag and drop a .crx or .zip file to scan for security risks.
upload.dropzone: Drop your .crx or .zip file here, or click to browse
upload.error: Scan failed. Please check your file and try again.

report.title: Security Report
report.noFindings: No issues found. This extension passes all checks.
report.notFound: Report not found. It may have been cleared from local storage.

history.title: Scan History
history.empty: No scans yet. Upload an extension to get started.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your security workflow.
pricing.guarantee: All scanning runs 100% client-side. No extension data is uploaded.
